mapper.insert: insert into student_course(id, studentId, courseId, teacherId, teacherName, status, score) values (#{id}, #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{status}, #{score})
mapper.update: update student_course set score = #{score} where studentId = #{studentId} and courseId = #{courseId}
mapper.delete: delete from student_course where studentId = #{studentId} and courseId = #{courseId}
